verification.detail: Dark-factory is documented as a fail-closed execution profile with launch preflight, refusal, and diagnostics.
Default mode is dark-factory and the profile requires validation, rollback, proof, and closure.
Launch writes preflight.json, refuses before runtime mutation, and does not downgrade on missing contracts.
Dark-factory is enforced, failed preflight is authoritative, and missing launch data is a spec problem.
dark-factory-preflight and fail-closed-launch-policy are marked repo-landed.
Wave 6 assigns A8 only the integration files and requires the ready-for-doc-closure marker.

deploy_risks: repo-local only; no live host mutation.
notes: Lint, launch preflight, and operator diagnostics converge on one fail-closed policy.
No integration mismatch remains inside the owned closure slice.
marker: [wave-integration] state=ready-for-doc-closure claims=0 conflicts=0 blockers=0 detail=lint, preflight, and diagnostics agree on fail-closed dark-factory enforcement
